kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your moves running on schedule. Ready to manage your crews and book more jobs?

quickActions.label: Schedule a move
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new moving job for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send a moving estimate for a client.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's moves
quickActions.prompt: What moving jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a moving company. You help manage local and long-distance moves, coordinate crews and trucks, handle estimates based on home size and distance, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We're here to help make your move stress-free. Are you looking for a moving quote or want to book a move?

steps.title: Name your moving company
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the areas and distances your moving company serves.

steps.title: Add your moving services
steps.body: List the services you offer: local moves, long-distance, packing, loading/unloading, storage, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure hourly rates, flat fees by home size, and additional charges for stairs, packing, etc.

steps.title: Add your movers
steps.body: Add team members so you can assign crews and schedule moves efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your moving company is set up. Start capturing leads and booking moves!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a moving company.
capabilities: Schedule and coordinate moving jobs with crew assignments
Create estimates based on home size, distance, and services
Send automated confirmations and reminders before move day
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Manage follow-up for storage and additional services
Analyze revenue by move type and distance
